response.global_analysis: The video segment contains the conclusion of 'Kimi Master!', a dialogue skit regarding band formation, and the beginning of 'Ready!! Steady!! Derby!!'. I have synchronized the subtitles to the vocal audio, used on-screen name tags for character identification during the dialogue, and confirmed lyrics via on-screen text. Instrumental sections and long pauses remain silent.

subtitles.original: 全開かい そうだそうだっ
subtitles.english: Are you at full throttle? Yes, that's right!

subtitles.original: 地球はブルーだブルーだっ
subtitles.english: The Earth is blue, so blue!

subtitles.original: ぜんぶを欲しがれ EARTH女子!
subtitles.english: Want it all, Earth Girls!

subtitles.original: 全開かい そうかもそうかもっ
subtitles.english: Are you at full throttle? Maybe, just maybe!

subtitles.original: 宇宙のスターにスターにっ
subtitles.english: To be a star, a star in the universe!

subtitles.original: なりたい! なりたい!
subtitles.english: I want to be! I want to be!

subtitles.original: なれそう? なれそうだよう!
subtitles.english: Can I be? It looks like I can!

subtitles.original: キマっちゃったしね!
subtitles.english: We've decided on it!

subtitles.original: 全速モードでよいしょっしょ 制限はね 無視だよ
subtitles.english: Yoishossho at full speed mode, limitations are ignored!

subtitles.original: なんでもかんでもやっぱっぱ 全力がいいよね
subtitles.english: Whatever it is, doing our best is the best!

subtitles.original: メガ回れ ヒメガ回れ
subtitles.english: Spin around mega, spin around hime-mega

subtitles.original: 最強 BIG BANG 狙っちゃえ未来!
subtitles.english: Aim for the future with the strongest BIG BANG!

subtitles.original: チェストー!
subtitles.english: Chest!

subtitles.original: 手とりあったるんたった 怖くはないよね
subtitles.english: Holding hands, run-tatta, it's not scary, is it?

subtitles.original: 夢の計測メーターは 振り切れそうだよ
subtitles.english: The dream measurement meter is about to fly off!

subtitles.original: 地球から やってきたボクラは
subtitles.english: We, who came from Earth,

subtitles.original: 本日も Go ahead! Go ahead!
subtitles.english: Are still going ahead today! Go ahead!

subtitles.original: 怒られるまで…
subtitles.english: Until we get scolded...

subtitles.original: …怒られても止まらないのです
subtitles.english: ...even if we get scolded, we won't stop!

subtitles.original: 最後の最後もごめんなさーい!
subtitles.english: So sorry, even at the very end!

subtitles.original: 先鋒だれだい? ボクらだい!
subtitles.english: Who's the vanguard? We are!

subtitles.original: いわゆる前人未踏の未踏地だよなあ
subtitles.english: It's an unprecedented, uncharted territory!

subtitles.original: もう一回っ!
subtitles.english: One more time!

subtitles.original: 大いなる一歩さ ボクらと最高速で
subtitles.english: A great step forward at top speed with us!

subtitles.original: 前人未踏の未踏地へ Go!!
subtitles.english: To the unprecedented, uncharted territory, Go!!

subtitles.original: そいやー!
subtitles.english: Soiya!

subtitles.original: 桃鈴ねね: よーっし、次はバンドだ!
subtitles.english: Momosuzu Nene: Alright, next is the band!

subtitles.original: 桃鈴ねね: できる曲を片っ端からやっていこう〜!!
subtitles.english: Momosuzu Nene: Let's do every song we can!

subtitles.original: 獅白ぼたん: でもあたしたち、楽器できなくない……?
subtitles.english: Shishiro Botan: But we can't play instruments, can we...?

subtitles.original: 尾丸ポルカ: こういうのはね、雰囲気っていうやつ、雰囲気が大事だから!
subtitles.english: Omaru Polka: These things are all about the vibe! The vibe is what's important!

subtitles.original: 尾丸ポルカ: 頑張っている姿を見せれば、それでOK!
subtitles.english: Omaru Polka: If we show them we're doing our best, it'll be fine!

subtitles.original: 雪花ラミィ: バカにしといて結局やるのね…
subtitles.english: Yukihana Lamy: You say it's stupid, but you're doing it in the end...

subtitles.original: 桃鈴ねね: じゃあまず、誰が何をやるのか決めよう〜!
subtitles.english: Momosuzu Nene: Then first, let's decide who's doing what!

subtitles.original: 桃鈴ねね: ねねはギターっ!!
subtitles.english: Momosuzu Nene: Nene is on guitar!

subtitles.original: 獅白ぼたん: じゃあ、ししろんはドラムかな〜
subtitles.english: Shishiro Botan: Then Shishiron will do drums, I guess.

subtitles.original: 尾丸ポルカ: ポルカはベースで〜!
subtitles.english: Omaru Polka: Polka is on bass!

subtitles.original: 雪花ラミィ: じゃあラミィは、シンセ…やろうかなっ
subtitles.english: Yukihana Lamy: Then Lamy will do... the synth, maybe.

subtitles.original: 尾丸ポルカ: そうしたら演出も考えないとな〜
subtitles.english: Omaru Polka: In that case, we need to think about the stage production too.

subtitles.original: 桃鈴ねね: 派手にドッカーンってしたい!!
subtitles.english: Momosuzu Nene: I want to go out with a flashy boom!

subtitles.original: 雪花ラミィ: ざっくりだな〜
subtitles.english: Yukihana Lamy: That's pretty vague.

subtitles.original: 獅白ぼたん: サビにキャノンとか出す?
subtitles.english: Shishiro Botan: Should we fire cannons during the chorus?

subtitles.original: 桃鈴ねね: いいね!
subtitles.english: Momosuzu Nene: Sounds good!

subtitles.original: 桃鈴ねね: 照明もレーザー出したりとかで、ピカピカにしていこう!
subtitles.english: Momosuzu Nene: Let's have the lights firing lasers and make it all sparkly!

subtitles.original: 尾丸ポルカ: じゃあ、ねねはポルカと動き回ってパフォーマンスしよう!
subtitles.english: Omaru Polka: Then Nene and Polka will move around and perform!

subtitles.original: 桃鈴ねね: やるやる、任せて〜!!
subtitles.english: Momosuzu Nene: I'll do it, leave it to me!

subtitles.original: 雪花ラミィ: だ、大丈夫か?
subtitles.english: Yukihana Lamy: W-Will we be okay?

subtitles.original: 間に合わなくってアタフタするんじゃない?
subtitles.english: Won't we just end up flustered because we didn't make it in time?

subtitles.original: 獅白ぼたん: まあ、それもあたしたちらしさってことで〜
subtitles.english: Shishiro Botan: Well, that's just our style.

subtitles.original: 尾丸ポルカ: ノリでなんとかなるなる!
subtitles.english: Omaru Polka: We'll manage with the flow!

subtitles.original: 雪花ラミィ: あ、そうだ、
subtitles.english: Yukihana Lamy: Ah, right,

subtitles.original: バンド名、どうするの?
subtitles.english: What about the band name?

subtitles.original: 桃鈴ねね: えー、かっこいいやつがいいな〜!!
subtitles.english: Momosuzu Nene: Hmm, I want something cool!

subtitles.original: 尾丸ポルカ: じゃあ、「青春★ピチピチフルスロットル団」!!
subtitles.english: Omaru Polka: Then... "Youthful Peach-Peach Full Throttle Squad"!!

subtitles.original: 雪花ラミィ: だ……ダサい!?!?
subtitles.english: Yukihana Lamy: That's... lame!?

subtitles.original: 獅白ぼたん: あ〜、もうちょい5期生要素も入れたいね。
subtitles.english: Shishiro Botan: Hmm, I want to add more 5th Gen elements.

subtitles.original: ラーメン、芝刈り機、低気圧……
subtitles.english: Ramen, lawnmower, low pressure...

subtitles.original: 桃鈴ねね: 「カブトムシ」って入れたらかっこいいよ!!
subtitles.english: Momosuzu Nene: It'd be cool if we put "Beetle" in it!

subtitles.original: 尾丸ポルカ: 「青春低気圧★ラーメンピチピチフルスロットル芝刈り機団」!!
subtitles.english: Omaru Polka: "Youthful Low Pressure Ramen Peach-Peach Full Throttle Lawnmower Squad"!!

subtitles.original: 雪花ラミィ: 混ぜるな、ぐちゃぐちゃだよ!
subtitles.english: Yukihana Lamy: Don't mix them together, it's a mess!

subtitles.original: 獅白ぼたん: じゃあ、ラミィちゃんは何がいいの?
subtitles.english: Shishiro Botan: Then Lamy-chan, what do you suggest?

subtitles.original: 雪花ラミィ: え〜、やっぱりかわいいのがいいかな〜。
subtitles.english: Yukihana Lamy: Well, I think something cute would be better...

subtitles.original: 「ねぽらぼハーモニー」とか♪
subtitles.english: Like "NePoLaBo Harmony" or something.

subtitles.original: 尾丸ポルカ: それでいいのか、ラミィ
subtitles.english: Omaru Polka: Are you sure about that, Lamy?

subtitles.original: 桃鈴ねね: かっこよくないよ、ラミィ
subtitles.english: Momosuzu Nene: It's not cool, Lamy.

subtitles.original: 獅白ぼたん: 俺、恥ずかしいよ、ラミィ
subtitles.english: Shishiro Botan: I'm embarrassed, Lamy.

subtitles.original: 雪花ラミィ: ほんっとに……お前らっ!!
subtitles.english: Yukihana Lamy: Honestly... you guys!!

subtitles.original: 尾丸ポルカ: よ〜っし! バンド名も決まったし、やってみますか〜!!
subtitles.english: Omaru Polka: Alright! Now that the band name is decided, shall we give it a go?

subtitles.original: 獅白ぼたん: これで、学寮祭の注目はいただきだ〜!!
subtitles.english: Shishiro Botan: With this, we'll be the stars of the school festival!

subtitles.original: 雪花ラミィ: えっ、あれで行くの!?
subtitles.english: Yukihana Lamy: Wait, we're going with THAT!?

subtitles.original: 桃鈴ねね: いくぞー! よーい……
subtitles.english: Momosuzu Nene: Here we go! Ready...

subtitles.original: 全員: どん!!
subtitles.english: Everyone: Boom!!

subtitles.original: 走って 走って
subtitles.english: Run, run

subtitles.original: 憧れを越えて
subtitles.english: Surpassing my yearnings

subtitles.original: Ready!!
subtitles.english: Ready!!

subtitles.original: Steady!!
subtitles.english: Steady!!

subtitles.original: Derby!!
subtitles.english: Derby!!

subtitles.original: まだ見たことのない
subtitles.english: Towards the other side

subtitles.original: スピードの向こう側へ
subtitles.english: Of speed I've never seen before

subtitles.original: ウォームアップは完璧さ
subtitles.english: Warm-up is perfect

subtitles.original: 地球をほら踏み込む鉄蹄
subtitles.english: Look, iron hooves stepping onto the Earth

subtitles.original: ゴール前のキセキ
subtitles.english: The miracle before the goal

subtitles.original: 仕掛ける場所は最終コーナー
subtitles.english: The final corner is where I'll make my move

subtitles.original: あとは行けるとこまで息を切らしてたい
subtitles.english: After that, I want to keep going till I'm out of breath

subtitles.original: 何万と手を叩くオーディエンス
subtitles.english: Tens of thousands in the audience clapping their hands

subtitles.original: 割れんばかり響く大歓声
subtitles.english: The deafening cheers echoing around

subtitles.original: ファンファーレが鳴る
subtitles.english: The fanfare sounds

subtitles.original: 心音が高まる
subtitles.english: My heartbeat quickens

subtitles.original: 動き出す秒針
subtitles.english: The second hand starts moving

subtitles.original: 夢のゲートが開く
subtitles.english: The gate of dreams opens

subtitles.original: いくぞー!
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: 走って! 走って!
subtitles.english: Run! Run!

subtitles.original: 憧れを追い越して
subtitles.english: Surpassing my yearnings

subtitles.original: 次は誰の番だ?
subtitles.english: Whose turn is it next?

subtitles.original: さぁ目指せスーパースター
subtitles.english: Now, aim to be a superstar
